recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: Orange
recommendations.overview: A girl mysteriously receives advice from her future self and as a result her group of friends, along with a newly arrived, troubled classmate, learn how to be better friends and a better community.

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.

recommendations.title: Uzumaki
recommendations.overview: The inhabitants of a small Japanese town become increasingly obsessed with and tormented by spirals.

recommendations.title: The Others
recommendations.overview: Grace is a religious woman who lives in an old house kept dark because her two children, Anne and Nicholas, have a rare sensitivity to light. When the family begins to suspect the house is haunted, Grace fights to protect her children at any cost in

recommendations.title: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
recommendations.overview: Nothing is as it seems when a woman experiencing misgivings about her new boyfriend joins him on a road trip to meet his parents at their remote farm.

recommendations.title: Before I Go to Sleep
recommendations.overview: A woman wakes up every day, remembering nothing as a result of a traumatic accident in her past. One day, new terrifying truths emerge that force her to question everyone around her.

recommendations.title: Suddenly, Last Summer
recommendations.overview: The only son of wealthy widow Violet Venable dies while on vacation with his cousin Catherine. What the girl saw was so horrible that she went insane; now Mrs. Venable wants Catherine lobotomized to cover up the truth.

recommendations.title: A Wolf at the Door
recommendations.overview: Love turns to hate and panic breeds suspicion as two parents deal with the kidnapping of their child.

recommendations.title: 100 Girls
recommendations.overview: Matthew, a college freshman, meets his dream girl in a dorm elevator during a blackout. He never sees her face, but instantly falls in love. In the morning, the power is restored, but the "dream girl" has vanished. All Matthew knows is that she lives
